name: Blair Park
description: Come play pickleball at Blair Park in Urbana, IL! There are 3 outdoor hard courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The courts are free.

name: Brookens Gym
description: Come play pickleball at Brookens Gym in Urbana, IL! There are 2 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. Players have access to restrooms and water.

description: Can accommodate up to 6 pickleball nets in large open gym space, but generally only has 3 set up during open play times. Gym area is used for multiple sports.
fees: Fee required — Day passes available, or annual memberships also available.
